welcome.title: Welcome to Qaio
welcome.subtitle: Sign in to save your agents and keep everything in sync.

retryHint: Wrong browser profile? Just click again to retry.

errors.identityConflict: That email is already signed in with another provider. Use the original sign-in option, or contact support to merge accounts.
errors.tenantMismatch: Your Microsoft account is not allowed in this Qaio workspace. Try a different account, or ask your admin to invite it.
errors.appNotConfigured: Microsoft sign-in is not fully configured for Qaio yet. Please contact support.
errors.adminConsent: Microsoft needs admin consent before this account can sign in. Ask your IT admin to approve Qaio, then try again.
errors.redirectInvalid: The sign-in callback URL is not allow-listed. Please contact support.
errors.providerDisabled: This sign-in option is not turned on for Qaio yet. Try the other provider.
errors.codeExchange: Sign-in did not complete cleanly. Please try again.
